description: Set up development environment with YouTube transcript dependencies
steps: Update requirements.txt with LangChain, YouTube API, and related packages
Update flake.nix to include new Python dependencies
Create .env.example with YouTube API key configuration
Install dependencies and verify environment setup
Run basic import tests for new packages
notes: Dependencies: langchain, langchain-community, youtube-transcript-api, pytube, google-api-python-client, python-dotenv

description: Implement YouTubePlaylistHandler for playlist and channel processing
steps: Create src/youtube_playlist_handler.py module
Implement playlist ID extraction from YouTube URLs
Implement channel ID extraction from various URL formats
Add YouTube Data API client initialization
Implement get_videos_from_playlist() method with pagination
Implement get_videos_from_channel() method
Add video metadata extraction (title, description, stats)
notes: Handle different URL formats: direct IDs, custom URLs (@handle), user URLs, channel URLs

steps: Create src/transcript_processor.py module
Implement load_transcript() using LangChain's YoutubeLoader
Add support for multiple language preferences
Add translation functionality
Implement _format_transcript() for timestamp and content formatting
Create format_transcript_as_markdown() method
Add error handling for videos without transcripts

description: Extend FileManager for YouTube-specific output handling
steps: Add save_youtube_transcript() method to FileManager class
Implement channel-based directory structure creation
Add filename sanitization for video titles and IDs
Include YouTube metadata in Markdown frontmatter
Handle special characters in channel names and video titles
Ensure proper UTF-8 encoding for international content

description: Add YouTube CLI arguments and workflow to main.py
steps: Add --youtube-playlist argument to argument parser
Add --youtube-channel argument
Add --language and --translate-to arguments
Add --youtube-api-key argument
Create process_youtube_url() function for playlist/channel processing
Implement YouTube-specific workflow branch in main()
Add progress reporting with tqdm for batch operations
Maintain backward compatibility with existing web crawling
notes: Language defaults to 'en', supports comma-separated language preferences

description: Implement comprehensive error handling and logging
steps: Add error handling for missing YouTube API key
Handle invalid YouTube URLs gracefully
Add logging for videos without available transcripts
Implement retry logic for API failures
Add warnings for quota limit approaches
Handle network timeouts and connection errors
Provide clear error messages to users
notes: Implemented retry logic with exponential backoff, quota exceeded warnings, detailed error logging and JSON parsing in YouTubePlaylistHandler. Covers API failures, rate limits, network errors. Pre-existing: missing key, no transcripts, invalid URLs.

description: Create integration tests for end-to-end functionality
steps: Create test_youtube_integration.py with integration tests
Test playlist processing with sample playlist
Test channel processing with sample channel
Verify output format matches specifications
Test language selection and translation
Test error handling for edge cases
Verify directory structure and file naming
notes: Use test constants for sample YouTube URLs, avoid real API calls in CI

description: Add performance optimizations for large playlists
steps: Implement pagination handling for playlists >50 videos
Add caching for API responses to reduce quota usage
Implement concurrent processing for multiple videos
Add memory-efficient processing for long transcripts
Optimize file I/O operations
Add progress tracking with ETA calculations
notes: Consider using asyncio or threading for concurrent transcript fetching

steps: Update README.md with YouTube transcript usage examples
Add YouTube-specific sections to documentation
Create usage examples for different scenarios
Document API key setup process
Add troubleshooting guide for common issues
Update installation instructions
notes: Include examples for playlists, channels, and various language options

description: Test with real YouTube content and validate output quality
steps: Test with real YouTube playlist (small, <10 videos)
Test with real YouTube channel (small, <10 videos)
Verify transcript accuracy and formatting
Test with videos in different languages
Validate Markdown output structure and metadata
Check timestamp formatting and readability
Ensure proper handling of special characters
notes: Manual testing phase - requires valid YouTube API key

description: Add support for additional YouTube URL formats
steps: Support youtu.be short URLs
Handle playlist URLs with additional parameters
Support channel URLs with /videos suffix
Add validation for watch?v= URLs
Handle international YouTube domains if needed
notes: Edge case handling for various YouTube URL formats users might provide

steps: Add environment variable validation
Implement configuration file loading (.env)
Add API key format validation
Create configuration class for YouTube settings
Add default value handling
Implement configuration override via CLI
notes: Use python-dotenv for environment variable management
